response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song "Chiisana Koi no Uta" via audio. 2. Performed a search: "Chiisana Koi no Uta" MONGOL800 Japanese and English lyrics. 3. Extracted lyrics from search results to provide both original Japanese and English translation. 4. Noted performer in video as Kaela Kovalskia (based on visual/credits context). 5. Created JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a character in an art gallery, followed by a cinematic segment and ending credits with a medley of songs performed by various characters. The primary song identified in the gallery segment is "Chiisana Koi no Uta" (A Little Love Song), originally by MONGOL800, performed here by the VTuber.

scenes.description: Character walks through an art gallery with paintings, while the song "Chiisana Koi no Uta" by MONGOL800 is playing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
広い宇宙の数ある一つ
青い地球の広い世界で
小さな恋の思いは届く
小さな島の あなたの元へ
あなたと出会い 時は流れる
目に映る全ての景色が
いつしか二人　時に激しく
時に切なく 響くは遠く
はるか彼方へ 優しい歌は
ほら！
響くよ！
誰かさんのおかげで
明日、もしも世界が終わるなら
僕の歌は、誰の心にも届かない？
誰かさんのおかげで
明日、もしも世界が変わるなら
何も知らない あなたの元へ
連れていって！
小さな恋のうたで
悲しみをやさしさに
変えていけ！
ほら！
連れていって！
小さな恋のうたで
想い出が色あせないように
彩っていけ！
ほら！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the vast universe, among many others
In the wide world of our blue earth
A small feeling of love reaches you
To you on a tiny island
I met you, time flows
And more and more letters share our feelings
Before we know it, we resonate
Sometimes intensely, sometimes with heartbreak
Oh!
Even if the world changes tomorrow
Even if everything becomes unknown
To you who is here now
I will take you
To where it all began
Let's keep these memories
So they won't fade away
I'll take you
With this sadness
And it will never be forgotten

To where it all began
Let's keep these memories
So they won't fade away
I'll take you
With this sadness
And it will never be forgotten

scenes.description: Cinematic sequence showing the character moving through a doorway into a dark, hallway-like space.
Closing credits sequence showing various characters on a stage and other still images.
